headline: ADR-018 sterilization teardown COMPLETE + pushed green on claude/storybook-publishable-9tdovm (epic #80), awaiting lead review before merge. #51 legacy docs SPA stripped → Storybook-only (resolves #56); #49 portfolio deleted (apps/concrete + 47MB public/assets, archived on archive/portfolio); #50 local-AI bot layer cut (Modelfile/llm-stream-bridge/codemods/claude-config/docs-ai/AGENTS.md, archived on archive/local-ai) with llms.txt generation RETAINED per Adrian as core DS self-documentation; #53 root-doc sprawl consolidated 25→15 (10 stale deleted, durable content salvaged, 0 dangling doc-refs). CLAUDE.md leaned, guardrail registry pruned, ADR-018 §1/§3/§7 amended. #60 variant contract on the same branch: Phase 1 landed docs/architecture/variant-contract.md + check-prop-vocabulary.mjs rules C/D + 6-component reference batch (tag, divider, stat, field, avatar-group, circular-progress). Phase 2/B1 converted file-input (drag/disabled state); checkbox/radio/toggle/slider/segmented-control flagged CSS-in-JS, need an inline-style→Tailwind migration first; stepper-field had no own className surface. Phase 3 (composites/overlays) just landed: Card (tone split into `variant` default|accent + fixed `tone` neutral|danger|success|warning|info — breaking rename, changeset added, no internal consumers affected), Breadcrumb (current-crumb axis), Carousel (prev/next control axis), CommandPalette (active-row axis) converted to cva. AlertDialog/Dialog/Tabs/Menu/ContextMenu/HoverCard/Popover/HdsTooltip reviewed — no prop-driven className branching to formalize (Radix data-[state=] styling already lives in one class string, contract-compliant as-is), skipped as nothing to convert. AspectRatio has no className surface at all. Legacy Tooltip (image-expand pill) is CSS-in-JS/framer-motion, flagged for a future migration. ToggleButton was already cva. Coverage now 35/123 (was 31/123). Every commit green: typecheck, lint --max-warnings=0, build:lib, build-storybook, vitest (1071), check-prop-vocabulary, pretest, check:size.
next: Lead review of the teardown + #60 Phase 1-3 branch, then merge. Attended — not yet merged.

#60 Phase 4+: the CSS-in-JS form controls (checkbox/radio/toggle/slider/segmented-control) and the legacy image-expand Tooltip need an inline-style→Tailwind migration before they can adopt cva. Remaining non-cva primitives beyond this batch still need per-component review.

Deeper 'docs → 5' collapse: requires unwiring ~11 doc-generation/guardrail scripts (DESIGN-HANDOFF/CONSUMING/TOKEN_GOVERNANCE/SYSTEMS_REGISTRY/DECISIONS/OPERATING_MAP/TOKEN_MIGRATION generators). Deferred.

Non-blocking hygiene from #51: reconcile the 13 pre-existing check-validator-wiring drifts; prune stale paths from knip.config.ts; decide check-reduced-motion Layer-2 semantics for a library (no App.tsx root).
Deferred: #64 (Astro evaluation). Human-owned: #47 (Figma Code Connect), #48 Figma text-style swap.
